Image Description: A daytime street scene in Vrindavan, India, during Holi. A diverse group of South Asian men and women are celebrating, their faces and clothes covered in pink and yellow colored powder. A man plays a traditional dholak drum. A banner reads 'Happy Holi Celebration - Vrindavan.'

A group of South Asian youths celebrating Holi in a decorated street. Bright pink and green powder is thrown into the air. A woman in a yellow salwar kameez and a man in a blue kurta are cheering. Banners with 'Holi Hai' are visible against traditional architecture.

A high-energy Holi celebration in a courtyard. Numerous South Asian individuals are covered in multi-colored powders. In the center, a woman in a white and green outfit smiles while holding blue powder. A man plays a dhol drum under arches decorated with marigold garlands.

A nighttime celebration of Diwali. A group of South Asian men and women are gathered in a street illuminated by strings of lights and traditional lanterns. A woman in an orange sari holds a small oil lamp (diya) and dances. Hand-painted henna is visible on the women's hands.

An evening scene combining elements of Diwali and Holi. A woman in a pink and orange sari holds a diya on a tray. People around her have colored powder on their faces. A man plays a dhol, and a banner reads 'Jai Shri Ram - Happy Diwali' in a bustling street.

A wide-angle daytime shot of a large crowd celebrating Holi in a street decorated with triangular pennants. South Asian men and women are dancing while pink, blue, and yellow powder clouds the air. Two men are playing large drums amidst a joyful crowd.

An evening celebration in a temple town with shikharas in the background. South Asian people in festive saris and kurtas throw colored powder into the air. A man in a blue kurta plays a dhol. The street is decorated with lights and flags at dusk.

A daytime Holi celebration in Mathura, India. A crowd of South Asian youth, wearing white t-shirts stained with color, are dancing and cheering. A woman in the center holds a bag of pink powder. Banners read 'Holi Hai' and 'Mathura Holi' on stone masonry buildings.

A nighttime Diwali festival scene. A woman in a bright orange sari is the focal point, dancing with arms outstretched. A man in a patterned blue kurta cheers beside her. The street is packed with people and decorated with fairy lights and hanging lanterns.

A grand Diwali celebration in a large courtyard. A large group of South Asian families, including children, are celebrating. Fireworks are exploding in the night sky. The buildings are decorated with marigolds and thousands of small oil lamps.

A split-composition nighttime image. Families with children watch a performance on the left. On the right, a man in a green kurta and two women in orange and yellow lehengas dance with Holi powder on their faces. A lit-up float is in the background.

A high-energy daytime street scene during Holi. South Asian men and women dance amidst thick clouds of pink and blue powder. A woman in a white and yellow tunic laughs with arms raised. Banners with 'Holi Hai' are displayed on traditional buildings.

A festive daytime scene with colored powder. A woman in a pink and orange salwar kameez dances while a man in a light pink kurta plays a dhol drum. Women in the foreground wear saris and hold powder packets. The street has triangular flags.

A nighttime street celebration with a large group of South Asian people in silk saris and kurtas. Yellow flower petals are thrown into the air. A man in a blue kurta plays a dhol drum. The background is illuminated with fairy lights and a 'Happy Diwali' sign.

A wide-angle nighttime shot of a Diwali celebration in an ornate courtyard. A man and woman in festive clothing throw yellow flower petals. Children in the foreground hold lit sparklers. Sky lanterns and fireworks are visible above illuminated arches.
